provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they hold Belgian nationality.

is_citizen_of_union.name: is_citizen_of_union
is_citizen_of_union.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_community_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
falls_under_community_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_present_on_territory.name: is_present_on_territory
is_present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.description: There are reasons to believe that the foreigner will abscond.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the member state responsible for examining the request for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the foreigner has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_own_authority.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_authority
recognised_as_national_by_own_authority.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_p.name: own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_p.description: The national authority of the foreigner's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
falls_under_nationality_category_for_min.description: The foreigner falls under a category of nationalities for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer directly.

criterion_1_no_residence_or_protection_a.name: criterion_1_no_residence_or_protection_application
criterion_1_no_residence_or_protection_a.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not submit a request for international protection within the period provided by law.

criterion_2_false_information_or_fraud.name: criterion_2_false_information_or_fraud
criterion_2_false_information_or_fraud.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

criterion_3_non_cooperation_with_authori.name: criterion_3_non_cooperation_with_authorities
criterion_3_non_cooperation_with_authori.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation or supervision of regulations on access, residence, establishment, and removal.

criterion_4_non_compliance_with_measures.name: criterion_4_non_compliance_with_measures
criterion_4_non_compliance_with_measures.description: The foreigner has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, freedom-restricting, or equivalent measure.

criterion_5_subject_to_entry_ban.name: criterion_5_subject_to_entry_ban
criterion_5_subject_to_entry_ban.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another member state that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_6_new_application_after_negati.name: criterion_6_new_application_after_negative_decision
criterion_6_new_application_after_negati.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence application or request for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, ending residence, or a pushback or removal measure.

criterion_7_concealed_fingerprints_in_ot.name: criterion_7_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
criterion_7_concealed_fingerprints_in_ot.description: The foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had already given fingerprints in another Dublin-bound state after submitting a request for international protection.

criterion_8_multiple_applications_with_n.name: criterion_8_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
criterion_8_multiple_applications_with_n.description: The foreigner submitted multiple requests for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other member states resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

criterion_9_concealed_prior_protection_r.name: criterion_9_concealed_prior_protection_request
criterion_9_concealed_prior_protection_r.description: The foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted a request for international protection in another Dublin-bound state.

criterion_10_declared_purpose_inconsiste.name: criterion_10_declared_purpose_inconsistent_with_application
criterion_10_declared_purpose_inconsiste.description: The foreigner declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a request for international protection or a residence application.

criterion_11_fined_for_manifestly_unlawf.name: criterion_11_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
criterion_11_fined_for_manifestly_unlawf.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria (1 through 11) is met for the foreigner.

subject_to_relevant_procedure.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
subject_to_relevant_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a responsible member state determination procedure.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a national of a third country: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

is_in_illegal_residence.name: is_in_illegal_residence
is_in_illegal_residence.description: The foreigner is in illegal residence: present on the territory and not or no longer satisfying conditions for access or residence.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The foreigner is identified: holds a valid travel/identity document, is recognised by their national authority willing to issue a laissez-passer, or falls under a nationality category for ministerial laissez-passer.

risk_of_absconding_exists.name: risk_of_absconding_exists
risk_of_absconding_exists.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, established after individual examination on the basis of at least one objective criterion, with reasons to believe absconding will occur, and the foreigner being subject to a relevant procedure.
